name: Aquatics & Fitness Center
description: Aquatics & Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Greenville, NC. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Eakin Student Recreation Center
description: Eakin Student Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, NC. There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Players have access to lights, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Elm Street Park
description: Elm Street Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greenville, NC. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at Greenville Country Club in Greenville, NC! There are 2 outdoor clay and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. A membership is required to play.

The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, trainers or lessons, locker rooms, water, and food. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Peppermint Park Pickleball Court

description: Come play pickleball at Sports Connection in Greenville, NC! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.
